policy.copyright_rule: Do not copy source text. Extract only NutriTail-owned structured decision logic, cautions, contraindications, and uncertainty rules.
policy.ranking_rule: Food ranking remains deterministic from Food V2 data and NutriTail rules. This source may support rule design and customer-facing explanations only.

priority_notes: Fill this template for each new book, chapter set, training folder, or reference collection before extracting rules.
